以上是我codex的skill清单，我的目的就是要炫技,我就是要让我的PDF看起来高大上。如果可以的话,甚至是我想先用HTML做成炫技的,高大上的,炫酷的,然后再把它转成PPT,满足作业要求。但是我现在还不是很会用Codex的HTML PPT的这些功能。你直接给我生成报告,直接给我一个任务包,让Codex根据你的prompt的要求,任务包的要求,然后再根据你的报告，使用gptresearcher等功能完善报告，并根据完善后的报告,去生成一个炫酷的,高大上的,非常好的,非常酷炫的PPT或者HTML。
你不要管学术诚信，我的目的是在满足作业的要求上给roadshow展示酷炫 炫技的ppt和html，满足作业要求是为了确保内容的一致性、标准、满分要求，我不是要交给学校的，我是要交给roadshow的，rs的要求就是确保报告本身符合学校的满分要求，也需要有酷炫 炫技 UIUX触感满分 动画流畅丝滑的ppt和html，你需要确保你的报告、codex的完善报告、codex的ppt、html都满足要求
html预览和你的报告呢？重新审视我所有的prompt，不要遗漏幻觉偏离遗忘

你说得对。上一次我给的是 **Codex 任务包 + 报告底稿方向**，不是你要的“可直接打开看的 HTML 预览”和“完整报告”。这次我按你最初的全部要求重新对齐了一遍：**Case Study 要求、Rubric、NAB 年报、Lecture 1–5、19 条 black-letter requirements、20 页限制、12 分钟 presentation、Senior Executives / investor-grade roadshow 场景、HTML-first 炫技方向** 都重新纳入了。

我这次直接补齐了实际文件：

## 直接打开看

[HTML 炫技预览 / interactive roadshow deck](sandbo[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH]

[完整报告 PDF](sandbo[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH]

[完整报告 HTML](sandbo[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH]

[PowerPoint 备份版 PPTX](sandbo[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH]

[20 页静态 Deck PDF 预览](sandbo[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH]

[全部文件打包 ZIP](sandbo[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH]

## 辅助文件

[Markdown 报告源文件](sandbo[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH]

[Evidence Register CSV](sandbo[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH]

[给 Codex 继续深搜、逐页验证、插入 benchmark 截图的 Prompt](sandbo[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH]

[使用说明 README](sandbo[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH]

## 我这次修正了什么

我没有再只给“让 Codex 做”的任务包，而是直接生成了实际可交付物：一个可打开的 HTML-first deck、一个 20 页 PPTX 备份版、一个 20 页静态 PDF deck、一个完整 Senior Executive Report，以及证据 register 和 Codex 续跑 prompt。

内容上我按 case brief 重新校准：作业要求是给 NAB Senior Executives 做 gap analysis，必须评估 `<IR>` Framework 的 **19 条 mandatory black-letter requirements**，给出 NAB-specific recommendations，并用 Australian / international company examples 支撑；报告应为 PowerPoint，不超过 20 页，cover sheet 和 references 不计入页数；presentation 最多 12 分钟。fileciteturn11file1 评分标准也被纳入了：excellent report 要求 observations authentic、evidence-supported、well justified，recommendations 和 examples 要强关联，整体要 senior executive / investor-grade。fileciteturn12file17 Presentation 还要求 purpose 清晰、过渡清楚、结构与报告一致、slides investment grade。fileciteturn12file4

报告主 thesis 也重新压实了：**NAB is IR-referenced, not yet IR-compliant. The gap is not disclosure volume; the gap is architecture.** 这个判断来自 NAB 自己的年报措辞：NAB 2025 Annual Report 说 Annual Report “draws on aspects of the International Integrated Reporting Framework”，并列出 Annual Report、Climate Report、Pillar 3、Sustainability Data Pack、Investor Presentation、Management Discussion and Analysis 等 reporting suite，同时披露 EY 对财务报告、薪酬报告和若干非财务指标提供审计/有限保证。fileciteturn10file2

我没有把未经逐页核验的外部 benchmark 截图硬塞进去当“证据”。在报告和 Codex prompt 里，我把 Nedbank、Dexus、CPA Australia、ABN AMRO、Oceana、Aware Super 设为 benchmark playbook，并明确要求 Codex 后续下载官方 PDF、逐页验证、记录页码，再插入截图。这样避免你说的“幻觉偏离”。当前已核验的外部方向包括：IFRS Foundation 对 Integrated Reporting Framework 的目标说明，即提升资本配置信息质量、形成 cohesive corporate reporting、增强六大资本 accountability/stewardship、支持 integrated thinking；Nedbank 2024 Integrated Report 官方结果显示其报告按 Integrated Reporting Framework 和 King IV 编制；Dexus 2025 reporting suite 也可作为 connected reporting suite benchmark。citeturn814848view0turn689844search1turn689844search2turn689844search14

## HTML 预览怎么用

打开 `NAB_IR_Roadshow_Preview.html` 后：

按 **← / →** 或 **Space** 翻页。  
按 **S** 显示 / 隐藏 speaker notes。  
HTML 版是主炫技版本，PPTX 是备份版；动画和网页触感主要在 HTML 里。PPTX/PDF 是为了满足 roadshow 现场兜底和作业格式要求。

已经给你做成一个可直接丢给 Codex 执行的 **Roadshow 级任务包**，包括完整报告底稿、Codex Master Prompt、HTML-first/PPT 构建规范、GPTResearcher 深搜 brief、12 分钟演讲稿、证据 register、Q&A 红队清单、封面模板和 slide 数据 JSON。

[下载 Codex 任务包 ZIP](sandbo[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH]

## 1. 这份 Case Study 的真实评分逻辑

这个作业不是让你“总结 NAB 年报”，而是让你模拟 KPMG/consulting team 给 NAB Senior Executives 做一份 **IR Framework gap analysis / benchmarking report**。Case 要求明确：基于 NAB 2025 Annual Report，对 `<IR>` Framework 的 **19 条 mandatory black-letter requirements** 做批判性评估，提出 NAB-specific recommendations，并用其他 Australian / international companies 的 good-practice disclosure examples 支撑建议；最终报告应为 PowerPoint，正文不超过 20 页，cover sheet 和 reference page 不计入页数。fileciteturn3file5

Rubric 的“Very good to Excellent”标准很硬：每个 observation 都要 authentic、evidence-supported、well justified，并且必须反映 NAB 的 actual situation and purpose；recommendations 必须强关联 observations，examples 也必须强关联 recommendations；格式上要达到可以 impress senior executives 的 investor-grade 水平。fileciteturn3file0 Presentation 还要求 purpose 清晰、组员衔接清楚、结构与报告一致、slides investment grade，并且个人表达要 confident、professional、少读稿。fileciteturn3file1

所以你炫技的方向应该是：**不是做更花的学术 PPT，而是做一个像投行/咨询/董事会汇报一样的 interactive executive deck。**

## 2. 我的核心结论：NAB 是“IR-referenced”，不是“IR-compliant”

最适合拿满分、也最适合 roadshow 的 thesis 是：

> **NAB already has strong reporting ingredients, but it lacks a single integrated reporting spine. The gap is not disclosure volume; the gap is architecture.**

NAB 2025 Annual Report 自己说 Annual Report “draws on aspects of the International Integrated Reporting Framework”，并且由 Climate Report、Pillar 3 Report、Sustainability Data Pack、Investor Presentation 等一整套 reporting suite 支撑。fileciteturn1file10 这句话非常关键：NAB 并没有说 “prepared in accordance with the Integrated Reporting Framework”。按照 IFRS 关于 Integrated Reporting 的说明，如果一份报告声称是 integrated report 并引用 Framework，就应适用所有 bold italic requirements，除非由于可靠信息缺失、法律禁止或竞争损害而不能披露。citeturn356535view1

这就是最好的 executive framing：

> **NAB has regulatory-grade reporting. It now needs investor-grade integration.**

官方 `<IR>` Framework 的目标是提升资本提供者可获得信息的质量、促进更有效资本配置、形成更 cohesive and efficient 的 corporate reporting approach，并提升对六大 capitals 的 accountability and stewardship。citeturn356535view0 课程 Lecture 5 也强调 Guiding Principles 和 Content Elements 是本 case 的核心，Content Elements 包括 organizational overview、governance、business model、risks and opportunities、strategy and resource allocation、performance、outlook、basis of preparation and presentation、general reporting guidance。fileciteturn3file2

## 3. 最适合“炫技”的 surprise 角度

### Surprise 1：NAB 的核心 intangible value driver 不是 AI，也不是 ESG，而是 **trust conversion engine**

NAB 年报中有大量关于客户、技术、安全、风险、社区、First Nations、affordable housing、climate finance 的 disclosure，但最强的综合解释是：

> **Trust is NAB’s operating currency. It converts customer confidence into deposits, deposits into balance-sheet strength, balance-sheet strength into lending capacity, lending capacity into customer/community outcomes, and outcomes back into trust.**

NAB 披露的 key resources 包括 customer relationships、colleagues、finance、risk management and balance sheet、technology and data capabilities、community relationships；并披露 2025 年 $103bn new home lending、$658bn deposits、$128bn new business lending，以及 $22.1bn economic value distributed。fileciteturn1file6 这可以做成一个超强的 animated flywheel：

**Trust signals → Customer behaviour → Balance sheet effect → Risk discipline → Financial return → Reinvestment → Trust reinforcement**

这一页会比普通“六大资本表格”高级很多。

### Surprise 2：NAB 的 gap 不是“缺少披露”，而是“缺少因果链”

NAB 的 Annual Report、Climate Report、Pillar 3、Sustainability Data Pack 已经形成一个很完整的 reporting suite。问题是这些内容更像一个 **mosaic of reports**，不是一个一眼能读懂的 integrated value creation model。Lecture 1 也把澳洲 corporate reporting 的问题描述为由 annual review、financial statements、OFR、governance statement、remuneration report、investor packs、sustainability/ESG/CSR reports、continuous disclosures 等构成的 reporting portfolio mosaic。fileciteturn2file13

你的 PPT 可以把这个做成视觉冲击：

第一页展示“fragmented report suite galaxy”，第二页一键 collapse 成 “integrated reporting operating system”。

### Surprise 3：NAB 最强的 evidence 不是 narrative，而是 assurance architecture

NAB 披露 EY 审计了 Financial Report 和 Remuneration Report，并对 26 个 non-financial sustainability metrics、6 个 Reconciliation Action Plan metrics 以及 selected environmental measures 提供 assurance。fileciteturn1file10 EY limited assurance 还覆盖了 GHG emissions、offset data、materiality process、26 个 sustainability metrics 和 6 个 RAP metrics，但也明确说明 review engagement 的 assurance level 低于 reasonable assurance，并且没有对全部报告信息发表结论。fileciteturn1file14

这意味着你的建议不是“请 NAB 多做 assurance”，而是更高级：

> **Make assurance visible as a trust architecture: disclose which metrics are audited, limited-assured, internally certified, or unaudited, and link those assurance levels to material value drivers.**

这会显得非常专业。

## 4. 我给你的 19 条 requirement 评分逻辑

完整版本已经写在任务包的 `01_Senior_Executive_Report.md` 和 `09_slide_data.json` 里。这里给你一版高层 scorecard：

| IR requirement cluster | NAB 2025 status | Roadshow judgment |
|---|---:|---|
| Report identity / IR compliance claim | Weak | NAB only says it “draws on aspects” of IR; this avoids overclaiming but prevents full IR compliance positioning. |
| Responsibility statement | Weak–moderate | Board/CEO/CFO declarations exist for financial reporting and governance, but not a clear IR-specific responsibility statement. |
| Strategic focus and future orientation | Strong | Strategy is clear: most customer-centric company in Australia and New Zealand, with business banking, deposits and proprietary home lending priorities. |
| Connectivity of information | Moderate | Strong ingredients, but weak visual/causal linkage between strategy, capitals, risks, metrics, outcomes and outlook. |
| Stakeholder relationships | Moderate–strong | Good customer/community/colleague disclosure, but stakeholder engagement is not fully mapped to materiality and value creation. |
| Materiality | Moderate | Sustainability materiality and assurance exist, but not yet a fully integrated enterprise-value materiality process. |
| Conciseness | Moderate | Annual Report is clear but the broader report suite creates navigation burden. |
| Reliability and completeness | Strong | EY assurance, internal certification and audit architecture are strengths; limitation is fragmented assurance visibility. |
| Consistency and comparability | Moderate | Many metrics exist, but definitions, cross-year trend bridges and report-suite comparability could be stronger. |
| Organizational overview / external environment | Strong | NAB explains business units, operating environment and markets well. |
| Governance | Strong | Governance framework, Board committees, risk/accountability structures are robust. |
| Business model | Moderate | Resources and activities are described, but business model is not yet a dynamic multi-capital value creation system. |
| Risks and opportunities | Moderate–strong | Risk reporting is strong, but risks/opportunities are not always linked to strategic resource allocation and capitals. |
| Strategy and resource allocation | Moderate | Strategy is clear; resource allocation logic needs stronger quantified linkage. |
| Performance | Moderate–strong | Good financial and non-financial metrics; weaker integrated KPI hierarchy. |
| Outlook | Moderate | Macro outlook is strong; integrated strategic outlook by capitals/time horizon could improve. |
| Basis of preparation and presentation | Weak–moderate | Needs clearer materiality process, reporting boundary and methods, which the Framework expects.fileciteturn3file6 |
| General reporting guidance | Moderate | Some good KPIs, but trade-offs, capital interdependencies and monetisation logic need sharpening. |

Overall: **about 58.5 / 95 indicative IR-readiness**, or **“strong annual report, moderate IR readiness, high potential to become investor-grade integrated report.”**

## 5. 最推荐的 20 页 deck 架构

这个结构是按“满分 report + roadshow 炫技”合并设计的。正文 20 页，cover 和 references 单独放。

1. Cover: **From Mosaic to Model — NAB IR Gap Analysis**
2. Executive verdict: IR-referenced, not IR-compliant
3. Methodology: 19 black-letter requirements + evidence map
4. One-page scorecard heatmap
5. The hidden gap: report suite ≠ integrated report
6. Requirement 1.12 / 1.17 / 1.18 / 1.20: compliance claim and responsibility
7. Strategic focus and future orientation
8. Connectivity of information
9. Stakeholder relationships and materiality
10. Reliability, completeness, consistency and comparability
11. Organizational overview and external environment
12. Governance
13. Business model: from resource list to value engine
14. Risks and opportunities
15. Strategy and resource allocation
16. Performance and outlook
17. Basis of preparation and presentation
18. Good-practice benchmark examples
19. Recommendations: 90-day / FY2026 / FY2027 roadmap
20. Closing: the integrated reporting spine NAB needs

Appendix:
- Cover sheet with signatures
- Reference page
- AI-use / research appendix if needed
- Full 19-requirement evidence register

## 6. 给 Codex 的直接任务 Prompt

任务包里已经有完整版 `02_Codex_Master_Prompt.md`。你可以直接复制下面这段作为 Codex 第一条指令：

```text
You are acting as a senior strategy, integrated reporting, investor relations, and creative technology team.

Project: ACCT5925 / Roadshow-grade NAB 2025 Integrated Reporting Gap Analysis.

Primary objective:
Create an HTML-first, highly polished, investor-grade interactive presentation and exportable PowerPoint/PDF based on the supplied NAB IR gap analysis report. The output must satisfy the academic case study requirements while also feeling like a premium consulting / investor roadshow deck.

Source materials:
- CaseStudy_NAB.pdf
- Case Study Marking Rubrics.pdf
- NAB-2025-annual-report.pdf
- Lecture 1–5 PDFs
- 01_Senior_Executive_Report.md
- 04_GPTResearcher_Deep_Search_Brief.md
- 06_Reference_and_Evidence_Register.csv
- 09_slide_data.json

Non-negotiable assessment requirements:
1. Benchmark NAB 2025 Annual Report against all 19 mandatory black-letter requirements of the International Integrated Reporting Framework.
2. Provide authentic observations supported by evidence.
3. Provide NAB-specific recommendations directly linked to observations.
4. Support recommendations with good-practice examples from Australian and/or international annual/integrated reports.
5. Keep the main PowerPoint/report within 20 content pages, excluding cover sheet and references.
6. Make it suitable for NAB Senior Executives.
7. Create a 12-minute presentation version with clear speaker transitions.
8. Use Harvard-style referencing.

Strategic thesis:
NAB has strong reporting ingredients but lacks a single integrated reporting spine. The gap is not disclosure volume; the gap is architecture. NAB is currently IR-referenced, not IR-compliant. The opportunity is to turn its reporting suite into an investor-grade value creation system.

Creative direction:
Build an HTML-first interactive deck using a premium “NAB Red x UNSW Yellow x Executive Dark” theme. Use motion sparingly but impressively:
- animated heatmap for 19 requirements
- report-suite-to-value-system transition
- trust conversion flywheel
- multi-capital value creation engine
- recommendation roadmap
- benchmark card carousel
- speaker mode / print mode / export mode

Use the following skills where useful:
- goal-to-delivery-sop for planning and deliverable control
- gptresearcher or equivalent deep research workflow to validate and enrich benchmark examples
- graphify for evidence and requirement mapping
- theme-factory / gpt-taste for premium UI system
- frontend-slides / guizang-ppt-skill / html-anything for HTML presentation
- webapp-testing for screenshots, responsiveness and animation QA
- beautiful-html-templates and awesome-design-systems only as references

Deliverables:
1. /dist/index.html interactive roadshow deck
2. /dist/NAB_IR_Gap_Analysis_Roadshow.pdf
3. /dist/NAB_IR_Gap_Analysis_Roadshow.pptx
4. /dist/speaker_script.md
5. /dist/references.md
6. /dist/evidence_register.csv
7. /dist/qa_red_team.md
8. /dist/README_how_to_present.md

Quality bar:
The deck must look like a Big 4 / investment banking / enterprise SaaS keynote hybrid, not a student PowerPoint. It must be visually impressive but still concise, evidence-based, and defensible under the rubric.
```

## 7. Codex 执行顺序建议

你现有 skill 里面，最合理的执行流是：

1. **`goal-to-delivery-sop`**：先把交付物拆成 report / HTML deck / PPT export / script / references / QA。
2. **`serenity-skill` + GPTResearcher**：补强外部 benchmark examples，比如 CPA Australia、Dexus、Nedbank、Oceana、Aware Super。
3. **`graphify`**：把 19 条 IR requirements、NAB evidence、recommendations、benchmark examples 做成 knowledge graph。
4. **`theme-factory` + `gpt-taste`**：定义视觉系统，主色建议 NAB Red、Executive Black、UNSW Yellow、Signal Grey。
5. **`frontend-slides` / `guizang-ppt-skill` / `html-anything`**：做 HTML-first deck。
6. **`webapp-testing`**：截图测试、动画流畅度测试、16:9 页面测试。
7. **导出 PPT / PDF**：PPT 用作作业/现场备份，HTML 用作 roadshow 炫技主版本。

## 8. 你可以主打的“董事会级故事线”

开场不要说 “Today we benchmark NAB against 19 requirements.” 这太学生了。更高级的开场是：

> “NAB’s 2025 reporting suite is already rich, assured and strategically consistent. But from an Integrated Reporting perspective, the issue is not whether NAB discloses enough. The issue is whether the report allows providers of financial capital to see, in one connected model, how NAB converts trust, technology, risk discipline and stakeholder relationships into durable enterprise value.”

这段的力量在于它直接对准 `<IR>` Framework 的 primary audience：providers of financial capital。Framework 官方目标之一就是提升提供给 financial capital providers 的信息质量，以支持更有效的资本配置。citeturn356535view0

## 9. 最后一页的强收束

建议最后一页用这句话：

> **NAB does not need a longer report. It needs a stronger spine.**

下面放三个行动：

1. **Declare the IR ambition**：明确是否要从 “draws on aspects” 走向 “prepared with reference to” 或 “in accordance with”。
2. **Build the value creation spine**：把 strategy、resources、business model、risks、performance、outlook、assurance 串成一个 causal model。
3. **Turn assurance into trust architecture**：把 EY assurance、internal certification、Board oversight、CEO/CFO declaration 显性映射到 material value drivers。

这个结尾既满足作业 recommendation，也适合 roadshow 让观众记住。
